Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Interface PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener

  • Enclosing class:
    PallyconDownloadTask
    public static interface PallyconDownloadTask.PallyconDownloadEventListener
    called by event while downloading content

    You can update UI for download progress using onProgressUpdate.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onCancelled()
      called after cancel() method
      void onNetworkError​(NetworkConnectedException e)
      called when there is a network error.
      void onPallyconDownloadError​(PallyconDownloadException e)
      called on other errors during download
      void onPostExecute()
      called when the download is completed
      void onPreExecute()
      called on starting download
      void onProgressUpdate​(java.lang.String fileName, int totalCount, int currentCount, int percent)  
      void onProgressUpdate​(java.lang.String fileName, long downloadedSize, long totalSize, int percent, int totalCount, int currentCount)
      called on download progressed by 1% when called percentage increase

    • Method Detail

      • onPreExecute

        void onPreExecute()
        called on starting download

      • onPostExecute

        void onPostExecute()
        called when the download is completed

      • onProgressUpdate

        void onProgressUpdate​(java.lang.String fileName,
                      long downloadedSize,
                      long totalSize,
                      int percent,
                      int totalCount,
                      int currentCount)
        called on download progressed by 1% when called percentage increase
        Parameters:
        fileName - name of downloading content
        downloadedSize - size(Byte) of downloaded part of the file
        totalSize - total size(Byte) of the file
        percent - total progress of download (percent)
        totalCount - count of each files to download(.mpd, .mp4(vedio), .mp4(audio))
        currentCount - count of each files to download(.mpd, .mp4(vedio), .mp4(audio))

      • onProgressUpdate

        void onProgressUpdate​(java.lang.String fileName,
                      int totalCount,
                      int currentCount,
                      int percent)

      • onCancelled

        void onCancelled()
        called after cancel() method

      • onNetworkError

        void onNetworkError​(NetworkConnectedException e)
        called when there is a network error.
        Parameters:
        e - NetworkConnectedException

      • onPallyconDownloadError

        void onPallyconDownloadError​(PallyconDownloadException e)
        called on other errors during download
        Parameters:
        e - PallyconDownloadException
